hero.description: We would like to invite you to celebrate with us the valima ceremony. It would be an honor to have you present at this important moment.

venue.intro: The celebration will take place at
venue.name: The Grand Marquee
venue.addressLine1: CL-7,14 Fatima Jinnah Rd, Civil Lines

thankYou.title: Thank You
thankYou.message: For joining us on this special day. Your presence is the best gift we could receive.
thankYou.caption: developed by Bebark
